category_sources: source_facts.description says Data compressor; official plzip page describes it as a massively parallel implementation of lzip.
display_name_sources: Official project page and online manual use the name Plzip.
docs_sources: Official plzip page links an online manual at manual/plzip_manual.html and documents purpose, download, support, and licensing.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official plzip page points to Savannah release downloads and project page, but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable identify a CLI compressor; official page describes multithreaded lzip compression/decompression.
